banner.title: A cherished culinary haven where tradition meets nature.
banner.subtitle: SG Nisarga Family Dhaba — serving authentic Indian food in a natural, tree-lined setting in Tiptur, Karnataka for over 12 years.

philosophy.title: What makes Nisarga special.
philosophy.subtitle: Simple principles that guide everything we do — from sourcing to serving.

items.title: Natural Setting
items.description: We chose a location surrounded by trees and greenery — because great food tastes even better in nature's embrace.

items.title: Honest Food
items.description: Quality ingredients, authentic spices, and no shortcuts. Every dish is made fresh with care and tradition.

items.title: Everyone Welcome
items.description: From solo diners to large groups, families with kids to tourists passing through — our doors are open to all.

items.title: Serve with Heart
items.description: Both table service and self-service available. We adapt to your preference and make sure you feel at home.

process.title: How a meal at Nisarga unfolds.
process.subtitle: From arrival to the last sip of chai — every moment is designed for your comfort.

steps.title: Park & relax
steps.description: Pull into our spacious parking lot, take in the greenery, and choose your spot — indoor or under the trees.

steps.title: Choose your style
steps.description: Table service or self-service — browse our diverse menu of veg, non-veg, and quick bites.

steps.title: Fresh from the kitchen
steps.description: Every dish prepared fresh with quality ingredients and traditional techniques.

steps.title: Enjoy the atmosphere
steps.description: Take your time with a masala chai, enjoy the quiet surroundings, and come back whenever you like.

team.title: The people behind Nisarga.
team.subtitle: A dedicated team passionate about authentic food and genuine hospitality.

members.name: Head Chef
members.bio: With years of experience in traditional Indian cooking, our head chef ensures every dish carries authentic flavors from across Karnataka and beyond.

members.name: Service Manager
members.bio: Ensuring every guest — whether dining in, taking away, or ordering delivery — has a seamless and satisfying experience.
